LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT CAFE TIRAMISU L L C'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF HAS RELEASED HER CLAIMS IN A VALID SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. SECTION 206.5 CANNOT INVALIDATE THE D L S E AGREEMENT WHICH WAS NOT SUPERCEDED. IN ANY EVENT, PLAINTIFF HAS NOT RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO THE EXISTENCE OF A DISPUTE AS TO PLAINTIFF WAGES. PLAINTIFF DID NOT PLEAD AND HAS PRESENTED NO EVIDENCE THAT WOULD SUPPORT RECISSION OF THE SETTLEMENT. MR. ROSS TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 437 C(G). JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB
